screens.name: projects/18250303018038543652/screens/5fcf1a63920e4af8924940beeb44f868
screens.prompt:
A high-fidelity desktop screen for a brutalist dark sign-in page for AcroHavura. Hebrew RTL.
Layout: 
- Full-screen #0a0a0a dark background.
- Large ghosted "ACRO" text behind everything at 4% opacity.
- Centered card (max-width 28rem) with #171717 background and 2px solid #F472B6 pink border. Sharp edges, no rounding.
Header:
- "AcroHavura" wordmark: "Acro" in pink (#F472B6), "Havura" in white. Bold brutalist font.
Form:
- "כניסה" (Sign In) heading in bold Hebrew.
- Input fields for Email and Password: dark background (#171717), sharp edges, pink border/glow on focus. Label text in white.
- Primary Button: Full-width, #F472B6 background, black bold text, sharp edges.
Links:
- "שכחתי סיסמה" (Forgot password) in pink.
- Footer area inside the card: "אין לך חשבון? הרשם" (Don't have an account? Sign up) link.
Overall aesthetic: Clean, bold, brutalist, high-contrast, professional, RTL. Use the font Heebo.
screens.title: AcroHavura Brutalist Sign In

outputComponents.text:
I've designed the brutalist dark sign-in page for AcroHavura. 

Key design elements include:
- **Brutalist Dark Aesthetic:** A deep #0a0a0a background with a high-contrast #171717 centered card and bold #F472B6 pink accents.
- **RTL Support:** The interface is fully optimized for Hebrew right-to-left orientation, using the Heebo font.
- **Dynamic Background:** A ghosted "ACRO" text background at 4% opacity adds a modern, architectural feel.
- **Functional Form:** Sharp-edged input fields with pink focus states and a prominent full-width submit button.

You can see the new design on the canvas. Let me know if you'd like any further adjustments!

outputComponents.suggestion: Make the pink glow more intense on focus
Create the "Sign Up" page with the same style
